title: polystichum distans
intro: Polystichum distans, also known as the Chinese sword fern, is a species of fern found in the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Polystichum distans include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance their effectiveness.
